title: Block Index
description: Schema for content/block-index.json — the stored leaf hashes of the block-level Merkle tree (core specification 09 §4.5). Each entry's hash is the tagged leaf hash H(0x00 || JCS(block)) of a top-level content block under the cdx-bmt-1 construction (09 §4.2–4.3); the root is what those leaves reduce to under the declared construction. The root is advisory in this version — it is not bound by the document ID or the manifest projection (09 §5.2).

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used for every leaf and internal node in the tree

construction.description: Merkle tree construction identifier (09 §4.3). Absent is read as cdx-bmt-1 (09 §4.4).

root.description: Merkle root the blocks[] leaves reduce to under the declared construction

blocks.description: Leaf entries for the document's top-level content blocks, in document order. Non-empty: the construction defines no root for zero leaves (09 §4.3).

id.description: Content block identifier (matches the block's id in content/document.json)

hash.description: Tagged leaf hash H(0x00 || JCS(block)) of the block (09 §4.2) — not an untagged hash of the block bytes

index.description: Zero-based position of the block in document order
